title: Simple Calculator
description: A simple calculator that can be used via a command and automatically copies the result to your clipboard.
body:
# Simple Calculator
## Features
Simple Calculator is a lightweight mod that allows you to perform basic calculations directly in-game.
Use the command `/calc <equation>` to calculate any expression.
The result will be copied to your clipboard and also displayed in the chat.
For equations you can use `+`, `-`, `*`, `/` and `()`
